ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account associated with the instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the instructor's profile picture */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the instructor */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the instructor has received */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is active */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the course (if applicable) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., question, study material, coding challenge) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the content belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the content was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is active */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "option1" TEXT /* Option 1 for the question */,
  "option2" TEXT /* Option 2 for the question */,
  "option3" TEXT /* Option 3 for the question */,
  "option4" TEXT /* Option 4 for the question */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer for the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is active */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the question has received */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_materials" (
  "study_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study material */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the study material belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the study material */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads the study material has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_materials_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coding_challenges" (
  "coding_challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coding challenge */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the coding challenge belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the coding challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coding challenge */,
  "problem_statement" TEXT /* Problem statement for the coding challenge */,
  "test_cases" TEXT /* Test cases for the coding challenge */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the coding challenge */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coding challenge is active */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the coding challenge has received */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints for the coding challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coding_challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coding_challenges_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the submission belongs to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "submission_text" TEXT /* Text of the submission */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., text, code) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the submission file (if applicable) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the submission file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the submission file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade awarded to the user */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the user */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was awarded */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who graded the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is active */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is active */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the comment helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forum */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forum is active */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the forum */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads in the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the thread belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thread */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the thread was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the thread */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is active */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts in the thread */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the thread has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is active */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  "use_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taggings" (
  "tagging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tagging */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag used in the tagging */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the tagging belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the tagging */,
  "tagging_date" TEXT /* Date the tagging was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tagging is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tagging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taggings_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taggings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taggings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
